name: China Nuclear Engineering Corporation Limited
summary: China Nuclear Engineering Corporation Limited engages in the nuclear power, and industrial and civil engineering businesses in China. It is involved in the construction of nuclear power plants and nuclear reactors; and industrial and civil engineering construction services in the areas of urban and municipal engineering, communications and transportation, energy, and petrochemicals. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China. China Nuclear Engineering Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of China Nuclear Engineering Group Co. Ltd.
